name: Pirates of Planet B
short_description: A Lo-Fi Survival VR Game, where surviving the end of the world with friends is what matters the most! Explore, Craft and Survive on the remains of a flooded world.
detailed_description:
A Lo-Fi Survival VR Game, where surviving the end of the world with friends is what matters the most!

After the Great Flood, almost all of the world is now covered with water. Manage the ship carrying you and your friends, finding the last remaining pieces of land, exploring, and crafting and fighting to survive this hostile environment.

Pirates of Planet B is a game about survival, crafting, and exploration in virtual reality, where you are in control of the boat keeping you and your friends safe.

supported_languages:
English*, Portuguese - Brazil*
*languages with full audio support
